html:
Exclusive to:

The Infroggles are a Character-specific Hat Item craftable only by Wagstaff. They are found in the Tinkering Tab, and require Spectoggles, an Electrical Doodad and two Torches to craft. While equipped as Wagstaff, the blurriness will be removed and everything on the screen will be infrared, causing all living things to glow bright pink (except for Clockworks and Shadow Creatures). For all other characters besides Wagstaff, the infrared effect will not work and their vision will become blurry.

Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Infroggles
"Is everything hot or not."
×1 ×1 ×2
Tab
Tier
Always available
Equipable
2 days
Does not stack
Perk
Grants Infrared Vision and removes blurriness.
Prevents slowdown from Heavy Fog when body slot items equipped.
"gogglesheathat"
“I don't think the science is working.”
–Wilson, when examining the Infroggles
“Why would I want to wear a frog on my head?”
–Willow, when examining the Infroggles
“Is cute little froggy goggles. Hello froggy!”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Infroggles
“A pointless thing to put on my head.”
–Wendy, when examining the Infroggles
“THIS OCULAR ENHANCEMENT MODULE IS OUTDATED”
–WX-78, when examining the Infroggles
“Ridiculous.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Infroggles
“Doesn't work.”
–Woodie, when examining the Infroggles
“What kind of ridiculous person made these?”
–Maxwell, when examining the Infroggles
“I do hope to catch a glimpse of the night creature with these.”
–Wagstaff, when examining the Infroggles
“Öne of Löki's tricks.”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Infroggles
“Is this what a frog sees?”
–Webber, when examining the Infroggles
“Looks like a frog. Acts like a fog.”
–Walani, when examining the Infroggles
“If they worked, they'd be great for checking meat temperature.”
–Warly, when examining the Infroggles
“Not fer ol'Woodleg's eyes.”
–Woodlegs, when examining the Infroggles
“HEHE! FROGGY HEAD MAKETH WILBA SEE FUNNY”
–Wilba, when examining the Infroggles
“Ribbit? No”
–Wormwood, when examining the Infroggles
“Swell. They don't work for me.”
–Wheeler, when examining the Infroggles
The Infroggles are a Character-specific Hat Item craftable only by Wagstaff. They are found in the Tinkering Tab, and require Spectoggles, an Electrical Doodad and two Torches to craft. While equipped as Wagstaff, the blurriness will be removed and everything on the screen will be infrared, causing all living things to glow bright pink (except for Clockworks and Shadow Creatures). For all other characters besides Wagstaff, the infrared effect will not work and their vision will become blurry.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Infroggles là Vật phẩm Mũ dành riêng cho Nhân vật chỉ có thể chế tạo bởi Wagstaff. Chúng được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Tinkering và yêu cầu Kính đeo mắt, Doodad Điện và hai Đuốc để chế tạo. Khi được trang bị như Wagstaff, hiện tượng mờ sẽ bị loại bỏ và mọi thứ trên màn hình sẽ là tia hồng ngoại, khiến mọi sinh vật sống đều phát sáng màu hồng rực rỡ (ngoại trừ Clockworks và Shadow Creatures). Đối với tất cả các nhân vật khác ngoài Wagstaff, hiệu ứng hồng ngoại sẽ không hoạt động và tầm nhìn của họ sẽ bị mờ.
